caption:
To those who think of me with unwavering devotion and constantly worship me — to these ever-united souls, I personally bring what they lack and protect what they have.

— Bhagavad Gita 9.22

#bhagavadgita #sanskrit #vedanta #hinduism #spirituality #sanatandharma #yoga #bhakti #upanishads #vedas #ashtavakra #shiva #krishna #wisdom #dailyverse
